name: tooltip
description: Press-triggered tooltip bubble that positions itself above or below the trigger based on available space

props.name: content
props.description: Text content displayed inside the tooltip bubble.

props.name: children
props.description: The trigger element; press-and-hold shows the tooltip, releasing hides it.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the trigger wrapper container.

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// Tooltip on an icon-only button to explain its purpose
<Tooltip content="Delete permanently">
  <Pressable onPress={handleDelete} accessibilityLabel="Delete">
    <TrashIcon size={iconSizes.action} />
  </Pressable>
</Tooltip>

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Tooltip wrapping a disabled button to explain why it is disabled
<Tooltip content="Complete all required fields first">
  <Button onPress={handleSubmit} disabled={!isValid}>
    Submit
  </Button>
</Tooltip>

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Tooltip with custom container style to constrain trigger width
<Tooltip content="Opens your profile settings" containerStyle={{ alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}>
  <Button variant="ghost" onPress={openProfile}>Profile</Button>
</Tooltip>
